education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Electrical and Computer Engineering

education.institution: Tohoku University STEM Summer Program, Sendai, Japan

research_experience.title: Undergraduate Research Assistant (Embedded Systems)
research_experience.company: Sensors, Energy, and Automation Laboratory (SEAL), Seattle, WA
bullets: Developed random forest classification models to analyze PPG biosignals and detect fatigue levels from heart biometrics in safety-critical environments.
Designed custom 3D-printed PCB mounts using OpenSCAD for wearable body sensor placement and integration.

work_experience.title: Lead (Drone Hardware Engineer)
work_experience.company: Husky Robotics Drone Subteam, Seattle, WA
bullets: Technical Lead: Spearheaded recruitment and technical onboarding for 20+ members; managed full development lifecycle of three custom PCBs (Flight Controller, ESC, PDB), BOM selection, and Professional Design Reviews.

Flight Controller PCB Design: Piloted design of a custom PCB (STM32H743, Altium) with DSHOT600, redundant power sensing, and telemetry broadcasting; achieved full compatibility with PX4 firmware standards.
System Integration: Architected companion computer system using Jetson Orin Nano and Pixhawk 6C via MAVLink over a redundant 5GHz bridge for computer vision and autonomous navigation.
Firmware & Communications: Implemented serial protocols (UART, I2C, SPI, CAN) to interface external peripherals, bridging hardware sensors with firmware logic for real-time state estimation.

Testing: Developed automated thrust stand using Arduino with hardware-in-the-loop (HIL) test fixtures to characterize motor performance using oscilloscopes, optimizing propulsion power efficiency by 25%.

work_experience.title: Autonomous Systems Engineering Intern
bullets: Wrote Python scripts to train computer vision models for autonomous landing zone classification and document categorization.
Validated LiDAR point cloud and imagery data.
